Manchester United Drop Points in 1-1 West Ham Draw

Dec 5, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Manchester United Drop Points in 1-1 West Ham Draw

Manchester United missed a crucial opportunity to climb into the Premier League’s top five after being held to a 1-1 draw by West Ham at Old Trafford. Diogo Dalot opened the scoring with his first league goal in 19 months, but United couldn’t capitalise on their early momentum. West Ham’s Soungoutou Magassa struck in the second half, securing a valuable point for the visitors.
